author: Tim Rice <tim.j.rice@hackrange.com>
name: htaccess_bypass
summary: High-fidelity check of an alleged access-control bypass: distinguishes real bypass from 404 / unrestricted resource / 403 noise.

args.--cookie: Cookie header to send unauthenticated comparison against
args.--baseline-404: Optional URL of a guaranteed-404 path on this host, used as the negative-control fingerprint
args.--threshold: Levenshtein-like body similarity (0-1) above which two responses are 'the same'. Default 0.85
